Дял на предприятията с 10 и повече заети: Share of enterprises with 10 or more persons employed using at least one artificial-intelligence technology
Share of enterprises with 10 or more persons employed buying cloud computing services
Изоставането не започва при изкуствения: The gap does not begin with artificial intelligence
България скъсява дистанцията при базоват: Bulgaria is closing the distance on basic digitalisation — from 47% to 55% of the EU level between 2021 and 2025. On cloud services, however, the gap is not narrowing: adoption stood still between 2023 and 2025 while the EU added more than seven points.
Изкуственият интелект стъпва именно върх: Artificial intelligence is built on precisely that layer. The Council’s national survey will show what sits behind the figures — which processes, which barriers and which sectors.
Дял на предприятията с 10 и повече заети: Share of enterprises with 10 or more persons employed reaching at least a basic level of digital intensity
Source: Eurostat — :dii, :cloud and :ai. Enterprises with 10 or more persons employed, excluding agriculture, mining and the financial sector. From 2025 the AI indicator covers eight technologies instead of seven.
